appointment.label: Appointment
appointment.title: Book a consultation
appointment.copy: Select a service, prepare your basic documents, and start from the portal or contact page.
checklist: Choose the relevant service from the catalog.
Keep CNIC, email, phone number, and business details ready.
Use the client portal for account-based service submission.
Use contact if you need confirmation before starting.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Talk to the team
contact.copy: Send your service query or start directly from the online client portal.
contact.formCopy: This frontend form is ready for backend integration. For active submission, connect it to the Node.js contact endpoint used by the app.

faqs.label: FAQs
faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.copy: Clear answers for tax, business registration, compliance, and online service requests with Zumar Law Firm.

items.question: Can I start a service online?
items.answer: Yes. Use the client portal at app.zumarlawfirm.com to create an account and submit service details.

items.question: Are prices fixed?
items.answer: Listed prices come from the service data file. Government fees, challans, or special case expenses may vary.

items.question: Where are document requirements shown?
items.answer: Each service page lists the required details and documents pulled from the app data file.

items.question: Can I ask before submitting documents?
items.answer: Yes. Use the appointment or contact page before starting through the portal.

items.question: Do you handle income tax registration and returns?
items.answer: Yes. Zumar Law Firm supports NTN registration, income tax return filing, profile updates, and related tax compliance work for individuals, businesses, freelancers, professionals, and companies.

items.question: Can you help register a company with SECP?
items.answer: Yes. The firm assists with company name reservation, incorporation documents, SECP filing guidance, post-incorporation compliance, and related tax registration steps.

items.question: Do you provide licensing and regulatory registration services?
items.answer: Yes. Services include PSEB, chamber memberships, import/export related registrations, intellectual property, provincial tax registrations, and other regulatory documentation depending on the business type.

items.question: Do you support international service matters?
items.answer: Yes. The website includes national and international services. International matters may require extra review because documents, fees, timelines, and authority requirements can vary by jurisdiction.

items.question: How can I contact the team quickly?
items.answer: You can call or WhatsApp +92 303 598 8574. You can also use the appointment page for a structured consultation request or email team@zumarlawfirm.com.

items.question: Do you have more than one office?
items.answer: Yes. Zumar Law Firm serves clients through multiple offices. You can view branch details, phone numbers, email, and address information on the Branches page.

privacyPolicy.label: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.copy: Zumar Law Firm collects client information only for service evaluation, document preparation, filing, account management, and communication related to requested services.

sections.title: Information We Use
sections.copy: Information may include names, phone numbers, email addresses, CNIC details, business details, service documents, payment references, and communication records.

sections.title: Data Protection
sections.copy: Client data should be accessed only by authorized team members and used for the purpose for which it was submitted. Sensitive documents should not be shared publicly.

sections.title: Client Portal
sections.copy: Portal users are responsible for keeping login credentials private and ensuring that uploaded documents are accurate and lawful to submit.

refundPolicy.label: Refund Policy
refundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
refundPolicy.copy: Refund requests are reviewed according to service status, work already performed, payment records, and any government or third-party fee already paid.

sections.title: Before Work Starts
sections.copy: If no professional work, filing, or third-party payment has started, a refund request may be eligible after verification.

sections.title: After Work Starts
sections.copy: Once document review, preparation, filing, or regulatory submission has started, deductions may apply for completed work and non-refundable expenses.

sections.title: How to Request
sections.copy: Existing clients can request refund support through the app portal or contact the team with their service and payment reference details.

termsAndConditions.label: Terms & Conditions
termsAndConditions.title: Terms & Conditions
termsAndConditions.copy: By using this website or the client portal, you agree to provide correct information, submit valid documents, and cooperate with reasonable requests required to complete a service.

sections.title: Service Scope
sections.copy: Service timelines and outcomes may depend on client response time, government portals, regulator availability, and completeness of documents.

sections.title: Pricing
sections.copy: Displayed prices are professional service charges from the data file unless stated otherwise. Government fees, challans, penalties, and case-specific expenses may be separate.

sections.title: Accuracy
sections.copy: Clients are responsible for the accuracy and authenticity of all information and documents submitted for filing, registration, or compliance work.

about.title: Zumar Law Firm
about.copy: A professional services firm focused on tax, business registration, regulatory licensing, and compliance support.

sections.title: Our Work
sections.copy: Zumar Law Firm helps individuals, freelancers, business owners, companies, NGOs, and professionals complete important legal and compliance steps with clearer documentation and practical follow-up.

sections.title: Service Areas
sections.copy: The firm covers NTN registration, income tax returns, GST and PST registration, company registration, PSEB registration, chamber memberships, intellectual property, import export licensing, and multiple regulatory registrations.

sections.title: Digital Client Portal
sections.copy: The client portal remains available for account creation, login, document submission, payment workflow, and service progress.

services.title: USA Physical Bank Account Service
services.summary: USA physical bank account support for eligible clients with Bank of America, Chase Bank, Wells Fargo, Truist, and IPC options.
requirements: Available banks: Bank of America, Chase Bank, Wells Fargo, Truist, IPC
Call centre clients are not eligible for a physical bank account
E cheque services are not available
This physical bank account will not be created on an existing or new LLC

services.title: UK Limited Company Registration
services.summary: UK Limited Company registration with registered office address, HMRC fee, incorporation documents, UTR, authentication code, gateway ID, and Companies House logins.
requirements: Address use for marketing and advertising
UK Companies House Web Filing login

services.title: Australia Trademark Registration
services.summary: Australia trademark filing support for word marks or logos with applicant details, goods and services classification, and filing preparation.
requirements: High resolution JPEG file if logo is provided
Clear description of goods or services
Australian trademark classes, similar to Nice Classification
Filing can begin once all required details are provided

services.title: Canada Trademark Registration
services.summary: Canada trademark filing support for Canadian or foreign applicants with agent details, Nice Classification information, and filing preparation.
requirements: High resolution JPEG file if logo is provided
Canadian company or foreign company with Canadian agent
Clear description of goods or services
Filing can begin once all required details are provided

services.title: UK Trademark Registration
services.summary: UK trademark filing support for word marks, logos, device marks, and combined marks with applicant and goods/services classification details.
requirements: Word mark or logo that you want to register
Trademark type: Word mark, logo or device mark, or combined mark
Full legal name of individual or company
Company name and registered address if applying as a business
Products or services you want to protect
Goods and services will be classified under the correct Nice Classes
Filing can begin once all required details are provided

services.title: USA Trademark Registration
services.summary: USA trademark filing support with USPTO class fee guidance, applicant identity details, residential address, address proof, and filing timeline.
requirements: Trademark type: Word mark, logo mark, or combined mark
Full legal name of individual or company
Company name and registered address if applying as a company
Details of the products or services you sell
Address proof such as gas, water, electricity, or internet bill
Application filed within 2 days after receiving all required details
Final registration certificate usually takes around 6 to 8 months
